en: Likewise, wives, be subject to your own husbands, so that even if some do not obey the word, they may be won without a word by the conduct of their wives-
zh: 照樣，你們作妻子的，要順服自己的丈夫，好使不信道的丈夫受到感動，不是因著你們的言語，而是因著你們的生活，

en: when they see your respectful and pure conduct.
zh: 因為他們看見了你們敬畏和純潔的生活。

en: Do not let your adorning be external- the braiding of hair, the wearing of gold, or the putting on of clothing-
zh: 不要單注重外表的裝飾，就如鬈頭髮、戴金飾、穿華麗衣服；

en: but let your adorning be the hidden person of the heart with the imperishable beauty of a gentle and quiet spirit, which in God's sight is very precious.
zh: 卻要在裡面存著溫柔安靜的心靈，作不能毀壞的裝飾，這在 神面前是極寶貴的。

en: For this is how the holy women who hoped in God used to adorn themselves, by submitting to their husbands,
zh: 因為古時仰望 神的聖潔婦女，正是這樣裝飾自己，順服丈夫，

en: as Sarah obeyed Abraham, calling him lord. And you are her children, if you do good and do not fear anything that is frightening.
zh: 像撒拉聽從亞伯拉罕，稱他為主一樣；你們若行善，不怕任何恐嚇，就是撒拉的女兒了。

en: Likewise, husbands, live with your wives in an understanding way, showing honor to the woman as the weaker vessel, since they are heirs with you of the grace of life, so that your prayers may not be hindered.
zh: 照樣，你們作丈夫的，也要合情合理的與妻子同住。要體諒她比你軟弱，要尊敬她，因為她是和你一同承受生命的恩典的。這樣，就使你們的禱告不受攔阻。

en: Finally, all of you, have unity of mind, sympathy, brotherly love, a tender heart, and a humble mind.
zh: 總括來說，你們要彼此同心，互相體恤，親愛像弟兄，滿有溫柔，存心謙卑。

en: Do not repay evil for evil or reviling for reviling, but on the contrary, bless, for to this you were called, that you may obtain a blessing.
zh: 不要以惡報惡，以辱罵還辱罵，倒要祝福，因為你們就是為此蒙召，好叫你們承受福氣。

en: For "Whoever desires to love life and see good days, let him keep his tongue from evil and his lips from speaking deceit;
zh: 因為 “凡希望享受人生， 要看見好日子的， 就要禁止舌頭不出惡言， 嘴唇不說詭詐的話；

en: let him turn away from evil and do good; let him seek peace and pursue it.
zh: 也要離惡行善， 尋找並追求和睦。

en: For the eyes of the Lord are on the righteous, and his ears are open to their prayer. But the face of the Lord is against those who do evil."
zh: 因為主的眼睛看顧義人， 他的耳朵垂聽他們的呼求； 但主的臉敵對作惡的人。”

en: Now who is there to harm you if you are zealous for what is good?
zh: 如果你們熱心行善，有誰能害你們呢？

en: But even if you should suffer for righteousness' sake, you will be blessed. Have no fear of them, nor be troubled,
zh: 就算你們要為義受苦，也是有福的。“不要怕人的恐嚇，也不要畏懼。”

en: but in your hearts regard Christ the Lord as holy, always being prepared to make a defense to anyone who asks you for a reason for the hope that is in you;
zh: 只要心裡尊基督為聖，以他為主；常常作好準備，去回答那些問你們為甚麼懷有盼望的人，

en: yet do it with gentleness and respect, having a good conscience, so that, when you are slandered, those who revile your good behavior in Christ may be put to shame.
zh: 但要用溫柔敬畏的心回答。當存無愧的良心，使那些誣賴你們這在基督裡有好品行的人，在毀謗你們的事上蒙羞。

en: For it is better to suffer for doing good, if that should be God's will, than for doing evil.
zh: 如果 神的旨意是要你們受苦，那麼為行善受苦，總比為行惡受苦好。

en: For Christ also suffered once for sins, the righteous for the unrighteous, that he might bring us to God, being put to death in the flesh but made alive in the spirit,
zh: 因為基督也曾一次為你們的罪死了，就是義的代替不義的，為要領你們到 神面前。就肉體的方面說，他曾死去；就靈的方面說，他復活了；

en: in which he went and proclaimed to the spirits in prison,
zh: 他藉這靈也曾去向那些在監管中的靈宣講，

en: because they formerly did not obey, when God's patience waited in the days of Noah, while the ark was being prepared, in which a few, that is, eight persons, were brought safely through water.
zh: 他們就是挪亞建造方舟的日子、 神容忍等待的時候，那些不順從的人。當時進入方舟、藉著水得救的人不多，只有八個。

en: Baptism, which corresponds to this, now saves you, not as a removal of dirt from the body but as an appeal to God for a good conscience, through the resurrection of Jesus Christ,
zh: 這水預表的洗禮，現在也拯救你們：不是除去肉體的污穢，而是藉著耶穌基督的復活，向 神許願常存純潔的良心。

en: who has gone into heaven and is at the right hand of God, with angels, authorities, and powers having been subjected to him.
zh: 基督已進到天上，在 神右邊，眾天使、有權勢的、有能力的，都服從了他。
